title: qwen3_think_mode
hypothesis: Enabling thinking mode (HARNESS_PRODUCER_THINK=1) on Qwen3-14B-AWQ improves mean score_r1 by >= 0.3 points over think=False on T_A/T_B/T_C.
notes: Motivated by producer_model_factor result: qwen3-14b (think=False) scored 0.344 points below qwen25-14b. Hypothesis: disabling thinking stripped the capability advantage of Qwen3. think_on doubles num_predict to 16384 (see agent.py _synth_options) so thinking tokens do not crowd out the response. Controlled: HARNESS_PRODUCER_MODEL=qwen3-14b set manually before both treatment runs — the mutable_scope only toggles HARNESS_PRODUCER_THINK. Pre-run: ensure vLLM is serving Qwen/Qwen3-14B-AWQ --served-model-name qwen3-14b --max-model-len 28000 --reasoning-parser qwen3 before starting. Run think_off first (already cached in search_cache.db from producer_model_factor), then think_on.
